title: Why Ecommerce Brands Always Find Out Too Late
excerpt: Most ecommerce brands find out about stuck orders when the customer complains. Here's why that happens and how to catch it automatically before they do.

title: Your Customer Exists in Six Places. None of Them Agree.
excerpt: The duplicate identity problem is silently breaking your marketing, your metrics, and your money. Here's what's actually happening — and how the best operators fix it.
